title: The Lost Diary
content: While visiting a secondhand bookstore, Ava found an old diary hidden between two novels. The first pages described someone's daily life many years ago. Curious, she showed it to the bookstore owner. Together, they searched for clues and eventually found a name written inside the back cover. After asking around town, they located the writer's granddaughter. She was surprised and grateful to receive the diary because it contained precious family memories.
